api.margin.get_margin_booking_candidates.name: GET /margin/booking-candidates
api.margin.get_margin_booking_candidates.description: Returns eligible margin calls for booking users.

logic.description: Reads booking-eligible margin calls and returns candidates for booking.
logic.sql:
select
  margin_call_id,
  margin_requirement
from margin.margin_calculation
where booking_eligible = true
  and margin_requirement >= coalesce(:min_margin_requirement, 0)

related_nodes.description: API serves candidates for the booking scenario.
API returns eligible margin calls.

validates.description: Booking candidate selection must be scoped to a business date.
The API returns eligible margin calls for booking.

view.settlement.v_margin_settlement_summ.name: v_margin_settlement_summary
view.settlement.v_margin_settlement_summ.description: View combining margin calculation, booking order, and settlement instruction status.
view.settlement.v_margin_settlement_summ.definition: Combines margin calls with booking and settlement status for operational monitoring.
view.settlement.v_margin_settlement_summ.sql:
select
  mc.margin_call_id,
  mc.margin_requirement,
  bo.booking_id,
  bo.dispute_status,
  si.settlement_status
from margin.margin_calculation mc
left join booking.booking_order bo
  on mc.margin_call_id = bo.margin_call_id
left join settlement.settlement_instruction si
  on bo.booking_id = si.booking_id

related_nodes.description: This view summarizes the parent margin booking settlement scenario.
